key_insight: PF-DIC integrates phase-field crack tracking into digital image correlation to measure displacement, strain, and damage simultaneously from speckle images.
engineering_relevance: It enables more accurate full-field measurements near cracks and reduces manual masking, improving fracture characterization and structural health monitoring.
method: Formulate DIC with a phase-field damage variable to represent complex crack morphologies.
Solve the coupled measurement problem with a finite element implementation.
Use the damage field to improve displacement accuracy near crack tips and identify critical cracks selectively.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports numerical examples showing PF-DIC captures different crack types while improving displacement measurement accuracy.
watch_item: Practical performance may depend on robust parameter calibration and solving complex coupled inverse problems for noisy experimental images.
paper_title: PF-DIC: Phase field digital image correlation for integrated full-field displacement, strain, and damage measurements
